evidence.scientific_clarity: Scatter of ~80 points, OLS fit line, R²=0.877 annotation, and highlighted OursModel point all present — brief fully satisfied.
evidence.typography: Script sets no pdf.fonttype=42; PDF embeds Type 3 DejaVu Sans (not selectable); SVG renders text as glyph paths with no <text> tags; default DejaVu Sans font used throughout.
evidence.palette: Blue/red/orange trio is colorblind-distinguishable and avoids green/red directional misuse, but red is used for a neutral OLS fit line which could imply directionality.
evidence.layout_density: tight_layout applied, 6×4.5 in canvas, annotation box and legend both in upper-right quadrant causing slight crowding near the OursModel label.
evidence.reviewer_readiness: Caption matches figure with exact coordinates; legend present; annotation box overlaps legend area slightly and could prompt a reviewer comment.
evidence.vector_fidelity: PDF fonts are Type 3 (pdffonts confirms GCWXDV+DejaVuSans-Oblique and BMQQDV+DejaVuSans as Type 3); text is not selectable; fonttype=42 was not set.
evidence.file_format: figure.pdf (21 KB), figure.png (70 KB), figure.svg (54 KB), caption.tex, and gen_figure.py all exist and are non-trivial.
evidence.caption_quality: Caption states the fitted equation (y = -0.0449x + 0.6209), R²=0.877, and OursModel coordinates (9.449, 0.210) — specific numerical finding clearly communicated.

overall_strengths: All brief requirements met: scatter, OLS fit, R² annotation, and OursModel highlight with label and arrow.
Caption is precise and self-contained, providing slope, intercept, R², and OursModel coordinates.
overall_weaknesses: pdf.fonttype=42 not set — PDF and SVG text is rendered as Type 3 glyph outlines, making text non-selectable and non-editable in Illustrator/Inkscape.
Default DejaVu Sans font used with no explicit rcParams configuration; legend and annotation box crowd the same upper-right corner.
